programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Whilst Hiroshi is working, Misae tries to stop Shin-chan from mischievously annoying him. Later, after his work is finished, Hiroshi spends time with Shin-chan.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan visits the zoo on a school trip where he causes a nuisance and proceeds to annoy the teachers and the captive animals.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When the principal pays a visit to the students of the kindergarten, Shin-chan asks him to sing a song. Later, the principal intervenes when Shin-chan kicks an empty can.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan tries to offer his assistance to Misae in preparing their meals for dinner. However, his participation complicates the situation.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan visits a retirement home, he meets a politician. However, Shin-chan ends up asking him embarrassing questions.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: A man disallows Shin-chan and his friends from entering an area from where cherry blossoms can be observed. Consequently, whilst he is away, the kids gain entry.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: On a hot summer day, Shin-chan pesters Misae to purchase an ice crusher for him. However, he eats too much of it and suffers a stomachache.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: During a school trip, Shin-chan acts mischievously and pesters Yoshinaga. Later, Shin-chan drops Kazama's handkerchief when they visit the washroom.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan learns how to stitch fabric and when Misae has fallen asleep, he takes the opportunity to stitch up various garments lying around the household.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae purchases a lottery ticket after she reads about her horoscope on a magazine. Later, she and her family dream of what they can do with their winnings.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: To allow his mother to rest, Shin-chan spends his time playing with Shiro. However, Misae wakes up to find that Shin-chan is sleeping inside Shiro's kennel.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan and his family visit an art museum and express their opinions on the exhibits loudly without realising that the artist is nearby.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Misae makes Shin-chan angry, he leaves the house. However, Misae later brings cakes and Shin-chan promptly returns to try some.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae inflates an outdoor bath tub during a warm summer day and fills it with water. Later, she, Hiroshi and Shin-chan enjoy a bath in it.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Shin-chan gets lost in a crowd, he is reported to the department for lost children where he helps a lost little girl reunite with her mother.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae comes to learn that an crow has been scattering waste around the premises and tries to chase it. However, Shin-chan tries to help her with dynamite.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When the progressively worsening weather forces Misae and Shin-chan to remain indoors, they wait until Hiroshi returns from work and then fall asleep together.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: When Matsuzaka visits the department store to vent her frustrations and see what they have on offer, she comes across Shin-chan.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Shin-chan calls for the fire brigade when he observes a fire whilst on patrol duty. Consequently, Misae and his pictures are shared by the newspaper.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: Misae and Shin-chan spend time together at home after Hiroshi leaves. However, when a neighbour visits them, Shin-chan tears Misae's dress.

programme.title: Shin Chan
programme.desc: After Misae receives five boxes of tissues from the market and brings them home, Shin-chan mistakenly discards the old tissues along with the new ones.
